messages.content: 因为sunny已经不在PACD了，所以我们需要对样品的邮寄联系方式进行更改，请你帮忙告诉工厂使用以下收件人进行邮寄，当他们需要寄样品过来设计的时候，请看下面，我也更新了INTRO PACK 并保存在我们的分享文件夹里面，谢谢！根据以上的话，帮我写一封英语邮件，谢谢

Subject: Change of Shipping Contact for Sample Deliveries

Dear [Factory Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to inform you that there has been a change in our team at PACD. Sunny, who was previously the main contact for sample deliveries, is no longer with the company. Therefore, I kindly request you to update your records and use the following contact person for all future sample shipments:

Name: [New Contact Person]
Position: [New Contact Person's Position]
Email: [New Contact Person's Email]
Phone Number: [New Contact Person's Phone Number]

Please make sure to share this information with your team to ensure a smooth communication flow when arranging deliveries. We greatly appreciate your cooperation in making this transition as seamless as possible.

Additionally, I would like to inform you that the INTRO PACK has been updated and saved in our shared folder. Please refer to the latest version for any required information.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. Should you have any questions or require further assistance, kindly contact our new shipping contact mentioned above. We look forward to continued collaboration with you.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]
不是发给工厂，是发给anna

Subject: Change of Shipping Contact for Sample Deliveries

Dear Anna,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to inform you about a recent change regarding sample shipments at PACD. Sunny, who was previously responsible for handling sample deliveries, is no longer with the company. Therefore, I kindly request your assistance in updating the shipping contact for future sample shipments.

If and when the factory needs to send samples for design purposes, please provide them with the updated contact details mentioned below:

Name: [New Contact Person]
Position: [New Contact Person's Position]
Email: [New Contact Person's Email]
Phone Number: [New Contact Person's Phone Number]

I would appreciate it if you could relay this information to the factory promptly, ensuring that they are aware of the change. This will help in ensuring a seamless process when arranging deliveries.

Furthermore, I would like to inform you that I have updated the INTRO PACK and saved it in our shared folder. Please refer to this updated version for any required information.

Thank you for your cooperation in this matter. Should you have any questions or require any further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me. I appreciate your attention to detail and support in making this transition smooth.

Thank you and best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Company Name]

Nice to working with you here.
什么意思
这句话是在表达对与对方在这里工作的愉快合作感到高兴。
delivery contact 是什么意思
"Delivery contact" 指的是用于与供应商或快递公司联系的人员信息，用于处理货物寄送和交付事宜。这个联系人负责协调和安排样品或货物的送达。
收件人呢
"收件人"在英文中可以用 "recipient" 或者 "addressee" 来表示。在邮件中，收件人指的是邮件的接收者或收件方。
邮寄联系人
"邮寄联系人"可以用 "shipping contact" 来表示。这个人负责确定邮寄的细节，如地址、收件人姓名和联系方式，并与快递公司或邮政服务进行沟通和安排邮递事宜。
delivery contact 可以不
如果你的意思是在邮件中不提及 "delivery contact"，你可以简单地称其为 "contact person"，用来表示处理样品邮寄事宜的联系人。在邮件中可以直接使用 "contact person" 一词，而不必注明为 "delivery contact"。
我的意思是可以用delivery contact吗
是的，你可以使用 "delivery contact" 来表示处理样品邮寄事宜的联系人。在邮件中，你可以提到 "delivery contact" 或 "shipping contact"，这两个术语是可以互换使用的，并且都能够有效地传达你需要更改样品邮寄联系方式的意图。因此，你可以在邮件中使用 "delivery contact" 来表示这个角色。

[12:02 AM] Tim Linn

silhouette - product type and shape that it is

[12:03 AM] Tim Linn

Gender is male, female, or all, and affects the size of the product

[12:03 AM] Tim Linn

Allocation is the size of the product itself, a size 4, size 5, size 6, for small or larger feeted people

[12:04 AM] Tim Linn

PPK is if it is a prepack or bulk item, and if a prepack what the combination of sizes are in that prepack itself, like 2 smalls, 2 mediums, 2 larges, etc...

[12:05 AM] Tim Linn

pres carton is the carton quantity or pack count per master carton

[12:05 AM] Tim Linn

and the packaging type is does it have a hang tag, a hanger, or some other packaging that takes up space in the carton

[12:06 AM] Tim Linn

all 6 items change the size and shape of the product, so must be tracked when creating carton sizes for each item, so that any future SKUS ordered with those 6 criteria if we already have an item created in the library, then the factory doesn't have to ask us to design anything new, they just pick that carton size from the library

[12:07 AM] Tim Linn

so my question about 10 packs, we recently converted some larger pres carton quantity cartons to 10 packs, so that is the question I am asking about, the data on those 59 items that are 10 packs now, and 26 had a larger pack count before with the same 5 other criteria (the only change is from pres carton is now 10, where before it was larger) 能帮我翻译成中文吗

silhouette - 产品类型和形状

Gender - 性别，男性、女性或不限，会影响产品的尺寸

Allocation - 产品本身的尺寸，比如4码、5码、6码，适用于脚较小或较大的人

PPK - 是否为预包装或散装商品，如果是预包装，则预包装中的尺寸组合如2件S码、2件M码、2件L码等等

pres carton - 每个主箱的数量或包装量

packaging type - 是否带有吊牌、衣架或其他占用主箱空间的包装方式

这6个要素都会影响产品的大小和形状，因此在为每个项目创建纸箱尺寸时必须进行跟踪，以便在将来订单中如果已经在库存中有具备这6个要素的款式，工厂就无需再提出设计新样品的要求，而是直接从库存中选择相应的纸箱尺寸。

关于10件装的问题，我们最近将一些较大的纸箱数量转换为10件装。这就是我提出的问题，关于这59个现在是10件装的商品，其中26个以前的纸箱数量较大，但其他5个要素都相同（唯一的变化是从较大的纸箱数量变为10件装）。

You need to make the packaging approval because INDUS in the scope.  But if you have already ordered the carton for some POs and Centric know this situation and Centric approved you can use the pre-order carton, in this case, you don’t need to summit the PacD Custom Form for packaging approval.   这段话是什么意思，有错误吗

这段话的意思是：
你需要进行包装批准，因为INDUS在其中。但是，如果你已经为某些采购订单下单，并且Centric知道这种情况并批准你使用预订的纸箱，在这种情况下，你不需要提交PacD定制表格进行包装批准。

根据提供的信息，这段话没有明显的错误。然而，有些术语可能需要根据上下文进一步解释。例如，“INDUS”和“PacD Custom Form”可能是特定于你所在的公司或行业的术语。如有需要，你可以提供更多上下文信息以便进行更准确的翻译和解释。
用英语帮我优化一下

You are required to obtain packaging approval because INDUS is involved. However, if you have already placed orders for certain purchase orders and Centric is aware of this situation and has approved the use of the pre-ordered cartons, then you do not need to submit the PacD Custom Form for packaging approval.

Based on the provided information, there don't seem to be any obvious errors in the paragraph. However, some terms might require further clarification depending on the specific context. For example, "INDUS" and "PacD Custom Form" could be industry-specific terms or specific to your company. If needed, please provide additional context for a more accurate optimization and explanation.
除此之外，你需要按照6月14号培训的流程一样，提交相关的信息再PacD
Additionally, following the training process on June 14th, you are required to submit the relevant information to PacD.
除此之外的情况，你需要按照6月14号培训的流程一样，提交相关的信息在PacD custom form for packaging approval. 优化一下这句话，并帮我说成英语
In addition, please ensure that you follow the same process as the training on June 14th and submit the relevant information in the PacD Custom Form for packaging approval.

Ok, and remind me again why we took them off the tracking list when working on qualifying material?

这是什么意思
此句的意思是请再次提醒我，为什么在处理资格材料时从追踪列表中将其移除了。
